# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [14.x]
        python-version: [3.8]

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      
    - name: Cache node_modules
      id: cache-node-modules
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: |
          **/node_modules
          .npm
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-node-

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Cache pip packages
      id: cache-pip-packages
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: |
          **/venv
          .pip
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-python-

    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}

    - name: Install pip dependencies
      run: |
        python -m venv venv
        source venv/bin/activate
        pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Cache configuration files
      id: cache-config-files
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: |
          .config
          config.json
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ hashFiles('.config/*') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-config-

    - name: Run build
      run: npm run build

    - name: Test environment-specific config
      run: |
        if [ -f .env ]; then
          echo "Environment-specific config found and cached."
        else
          echo "Environment-specific config not found. Please check your setup."
          exit 1
        fi
